family: 18-8 Stainless Steel Shim, for Shortening 5 mm Diameter Screw Shoulders
known_contradictions: Listed as 'For Screw Size M5' / 'For Shoulder Diameter 5 mm' -- this is a generic shoulder-shortening shim sized to a 5 mm shoulder diameter, not specific to the M4-threaded screw end. Our axle (96654A131) HAS a 5 mm shoulder diameter (manufacturer-confirmed), so the ID/OD fit is correct by shoulder-diameter match; the 'M5' label refers to McMaster's screw-size taxonomy for this shim family and does not contradict use with our M4-threaded shoulder screw -- ID is the controlling fit dimension (manufacturer-confirmed 5 mm), not the thread callout.
